'''gathuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:body|body]]". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:body|body]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gathuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæthirith|gæthirith]] || [[word:gæthirij|gæthirij]] || [[word:gæthirish|gæthirish]] || [[word:gæthiri|gæthiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathuthuruth|gathuthuruth]] || [[word:gathuthuruj|gathuthuruj]] || [[word:gathuthurush|gathuthurush]] || [[word:gathuthuru|gathuthuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathuruth|gathuruth]] || [[word:gathuruj|gathuruj]] || [[word:gathurush|gathurush]] || [[word:gathuru|gathuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathufruth|gathufruth]] || [[word:gathufruj|gathufruj]] || [[word:gathufrush|gathufrush]] || [[word:gathufruf|gathufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gathuruthu|gathuruthu]] || [[word:gathuruju|gathuruju]] || [[word:gathurushu|gathurushu]] || [[word:gathuruku|gathuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gathuruth|gathuruth]] || [[word:gathuruj|gathuruj]] || [[word:gathurush|gathurush]] || [[word:gathuru|gathuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gathuruthul|gathuruthul]] || [[word:gathurujul|gathurujul]] || [[word:gathurushul|gathurushul]] || [[word:gathurukul|gathurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gathuruthuthu|gathuruthuthu]] || [[word:gathurujuju|gathurujuju]] || [[word:gathurushushu|gathurushushu]] || [[word:gathuruku|gathuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gathuruthun|gathuruthun]] || [[word:gathurujun|gathurujun]] || [[word:gathurushun|gathurushun]] || [[word:gathurukun|gathurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gathuruthuoro|gathuruthuoro]] || [[word:gathurujuoro|gathurujuoro]] || [[word:gathurushuoro|gathurushuoro]] || [[word:gathurukuoro|gathurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
